UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS TOAN THAT AND QUYNHMAI TONNU'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD FOR PLAINTIFFS TO ALLEGE FRAUD WITH REQUISITE PARTICULARITY AS TO EACH DEFENDANT. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFFS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGE ORIGINAL AND MODIFIED JOINT VENTURE CONTRACT AND PERFORMANCE UNDER THE CONTRACT. WAIVER IS AN ISSUE OF FACT. PLAINTIFF'S QUIET TITLE CAUSE OF ACTION IS BASED ON BREACH OF CONTRACT/FRAUD, WHICH ALLEGEDLY ACCRUED IN OCTOBER 2011. CONVERSION OF THE RE-FINANCE FUNDS IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. PRESENT AND ACTUAL CONTROVERSY IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs TOAN THAT and QUYNHMAI TONNU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 6th cause of action for fraud for Plaintiffs to allege fraud with requisite particularity as to each defendant. Demurrer is overruled as to other causes of action. Plaintiffs sufficiently allege original and modified joint venture contract and performance under the contract. Waiver is an issue of fact. Plaintiff's quiet title cause of action is based on breach of contract/fraud, which allegedly accrued in October 2011. Conversion of the re-finance funds is sufficiently alleged. Present and actual controversy is sufficiently alleged. Moving party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)
